steps.t: Fredegar Bolger has been making and storing stink-bombs around Nobottle, should the need arise. You should collect all the stink-bombs for Fredegar Bo…
Lotho's Bounders can be found in Yondershire. You should throw stink bombs at Lotho's Bounders.
Fredegar Bolger can be found in the village of Nobottle. You should talk to Fredegar Bolger.
